title: Advanced Grilling Techniques
description: Learn advanced techniques for grilling meats and vegetables.
steps: Understand the different types of grills and their uses.
Learn about marinades and rubs for flavor enhancement.
Practice controlling grill temperature for different foods.
Experiment with indirect grilling and smoking techniques.
safety_notes: Ensure all meats are cooked to safe temperatures.
Be cautious with flare-ups and fire hazards.
